title: Bambusa lingnanioides
taxonomy: Bambusa lingnanioides is a species of bamboo in the family Poaceae. This species belongs to the genus Bambusa, which includes several species of bamboo native to Asia. Bambusa lingnanioides is a type of clump-forming bamboo, typically found in tropical and subtropical regions. The classification of Bambusa lingnanioides includes its rank as a species (B. lingnanioides), genus (Bambusa), family (Poaceae), order (Poales), class (Liliopsida), division (Magnoliophyta), and kingdom (Plantae). Its classification reflects its evolutionary relationships and position within the plant kingdom.
